title: Cell Growth Assay Protocol
author: Kiichi Hirota
license_note: Confirmed via CrossRef DOI metadata: dx.doi.org/10.17504/protocols.io.v64e9gw

steps.title: Cells were seeded into 96-well plates...
steps.instruction: Cells were seeded into 96-well plates and cultivated for indicated time periods

steps.title: 20 μl of CellTiter 96 ®...
steps.instruction: 20 μl of CellTiter 96 ® AQueous One Solution Reagent was added to each well.

steps.title: The plates were incubated at 37...
steps.instruction: The plates were incubated at 37 °C for 1 h prior to measuring the absorbance of each sample using an iMark™ Microplate Reader (BIO-RAD, Hercules, CA, USA) at a wavelength of 490 nm.

steps.title: Cell viability was then calculated by...
steps.instruction: Cell viability was then calculated by comparing the absorbance of the treated cells with that of the control cells, with the latter defined as 100%. All samples were assayed in triplicate or quadruplicate for each experiment.
